leadText: The Silver Pick (Japanese: シルバーピック Silver Pick) is a type of picnic item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Silver Pick can be used to complete a sandwich made during a picnic .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A silver pick that oozes class. Using it on a sandwich lends an extravagant air that'll make you want to eat up, even if you don't love the fillings.

sections.title: In the core series games

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A silver pick that oozes class. Using it on a sandwich lends an extravagant air that'll make you want to eat up, even if you don't love the fillings. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods S V Artisan Bakery S V TM Peachy's S V ID Vending machines ( Terarium )
